items.name_cn:
C Family: Luggage Smile Bag ▶
🔗Classic, timeless, top version, new upgrade
❤️A style that has been popular for many years, still loved this year
❤️Solid exterior, energetic spirit, paired with vintage silver metal, handsome and proud
❤️Perfect silhouette, combining a structure that is wide at the top and narrow at the bottom
❤️Suitable for office workers and creates a casual charm, different styles (with packaging)
Model No.: 189793 Calfskin/Kesec (Color)
Size: 27-25-13

items.name_cn:
C'EST DIOR Small Bag "Woven" ❣️❣️❣️
This C'est Dior bag is a new arrival for Fall 2023, elegant and classic. Crafted from natural-colored straw, it features a woven pattern throughout, creating a striking contrast with the calfskin accents. Bucket bag silhouette with CD Lock closure featuring a rotary letter D, securely holding daily essentials. Small size with top handle and detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band, can be carried by hand for a relaxed look.
CD Lock closure
Detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band
Top detachable leather handle
Model: 2272
Size: 17×7×18cm
